overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt of Rivia exploring a multi-level medieval house with wooden and stone interiors lit by candles, then exiting into a bright sunlit historic town with cobblestone streets and stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground floor kitchen and dining area of wooden house

agents.ego_description: walking around the ground floor examining the kitchen area and dining table

entered.detail: long wooden table with plates and food items on top
small round wooden stool near the table
lit candle mounted on the wooden wall providing warm light
tall shelves holding pottery and kitchen supplies

segments.scene_description: Geralt explores the candlelit ground floor of a wooden house, featuring a dining area with a central table, stools, and kitchen shelving. The space is warmly lit and completely enclosed.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper floor attic bedroom with exposed beams

events.description: begins ascending wooden staircase to upper floor
natural daylight becomes visible through attic windows

agents.ego_description: climbing wooden stairs and exploring the attic bedroom, looking out through the windows

entered.detail: simple wooden bed with fur covering in the corner
small window showing exterior brick walls and daylight
storage chest at the foot of the bed
brick wall visible through the window opening

segments.scene_description: The character ascends to an attic bedroom with sloped wooden ceilings and windows that let in natural light. The room contains a bed with fur coverings and storage chests, contrasting with the darker ground floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: basement tavern with stone walls and seated patrons

events.description: descends narrow staircase to lower basement level
passes into darker stone-walled area with candlelight

agents.ego_description: walking down to the basement level and passing by NPCs seated at a wooden table

notable_agents.action: two men sitting at a wooden table drinking and conversing

entered.detail: rough stone walls replacing the wooden paneling of upper floors
thick wooden door leading to the outside
wooden table where NPCs are seated

segments.scene_description: Descending into a darker basement with stone walls and wooden supports, the character passes NPCs seated at tables in a tavern-like atmosphere. The lighting shifts to dimmer candlelight as the character approaches a heavy wooden exit door.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval cobblestone alley between stone buildings

events.description: exits building into bright sunlight of medieval town
full natural sunlight illuminates the cobblestone street and stone architecture

agents.ego_description: walking through the town following a villager in yellow clothing through the cobblestone streets

notable_agents.action: villager in yellow tunic walking ahead of the character
villager in brown clothing walking alongside the character

entered.detail: sunlit cobblestone path winding between tall stone buildings
tall medieval stone architecture with weathered surfaces
red cloth banner hanging from a building

segments.scene_description: Exiting the building into bright sunlight, the character emerges onto a cobblestone street in a medieval town. Stone buildings line the path, with villagers walking about and an archway visible ahead. The environment shifts dramatically from dim interior to sunlit urban historic setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the varying levels of a medieval house that eventually opens into a bright, bustling town square. It begins on a warmly lit wooden ground floor featuring a dining area and kitchen shelving before ascending into an attic bedroom where sloped ceilings and natural light contrast with the darker levels below. The camera then descends into a dim basement characterized by stone walls and a tavern-like atmosphere, moving past seated NPCs toward a heavy wooden exit door. As the door opens, the environment shifts dramatically from the dim interior to a sunlit cobblestone street lined with stone buildings and walking villagers. The sequence finally expands to reveal a wide urban historic setting with a prominent archway visible ahead.
